message:
feat(io): add JSON IO, CSV options, and file-based read/write

Adds JSON read/write with three orientations (records, columns, split),
CSV read with configurable delimiter/na_values/index_col, and file-based
IO for both CSV and JSON. 12 new tests covering all functionality.

Closes: bd-2gi.19

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
